Should be stripped by scraper
Should be stripped by scraper
Bonjour, comment allez-vous ?
Hello, how are you?
Il lui a dit bonjour en arrivant.
He said hello to her when he arrived.
Bonjour à tous !
Good morning everyone!
Elle m'a souhaité le bonjour.
She wished me good morning.
Dites-lui bonjour de ma part.
Say hello to him for me.
Bonjour, je voudrais un café.
Good morning, I would like a coffee.
